name: MockupLM
description: Visual UX mockup creation with HTML/CSS for planning and design
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Share selected mockup screens with AI and render shared mockup links more reliably.
1.0.1: Share to Team collaboration for mockups and projects, shared viewer and diff review fixes.
marketplace.tagline: AI-generated UI mockups rendered as live HTML/CSS
marketplace.longDescription: Design UI mockups by describing what you want in natural language. The AI generates complete HTML/CSS mockups that render as live previews in the editor. Iterate on designs visually or switch to source mode to hand-edit the HTML. Great for planning features, communicating designs, and rapid prototyping.
highlights: AI generates complete HTML/CSS mockups from descriptions
Live rendered preview of your designs
Source mode for hand-editing HTML and CSS
Rapid iteration on UI concepts without design tools

screenshots.alt: Team dashboard mockup with stats cards and deployment table

newFileMenu.defaultContent:
New Mockup

Start designing your UI here.

claudePlugin.description: Visual UX mockup creation with HTML/CSS
